name: Synup vs Experience.com
hero_main_title: A local marketing tool built for scale – Synup’s the best switch from Experience.com
hero_summary: Unlike Experience.com’s scattered offerings, Synup gives you a platform built for local success. Synup trumps their platform on two things – deeper integrations (connect with CRM/POS to acquire reviews) and an innovative feature set (Personalized local campaigns and AI-powered solutions) that keeps you ahead.

section_2_summary: It’s simple – we understand the industry better. You’re not just getting an add-on feature on Synup, you get dedicated local marketing expertise and an intuitive tool that knows how to pull the right levers. Instead of spraying and praying with Experience.com, work with a solution that specializes in local visibility.
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup provides a comprehensive and AI-enhanced approach to reputation management, offering more depth and efficiency than DigitalMass. Synup's platform includes intelligent response templates and advanced analytics for a complete view of customer feedback and online presence​​.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Compared to Experience.com, Synup offers a broader and more integrated listings management solution. Synup ensures accurate and consistent business information across a wide range of platforms, enhancing online visibility and credibility​​.
section_2_step_3_summary: Synup's local pages optimization tools are designed for superior user experience and SEO effectiveness, providing an edge over DigitalMass's offerings. Synup focuses on maximizing online visibility and engagement through optimized local pages that cater to specific business needs​​.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Experience.com does not offer social media management solutions, Synup's AI-assisted platform provides a more comprehensive approach. Synup's tools are tailored for efficient content creation, scheduling, and management across various social media platforms, ensuring better engagement and reach.

Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
